chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1781 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case(Priority) 1.For orders on CMA 2879/25 2.For orders on CMA 2880/25 3.For orders on o/objections 4.For hearing of CMA 6754/24 5.For hearing of main case 04-09-2025 None present for the petitioners. M/s Ali Raza Baloch, Additional A.G and Gulzar Ahmed Malano, APG. **** None present for the petitioners, nor any intimation is received; same was the position on the last date of hearing. Today, learned APG submitted a copy of case-diary obtained from CFMS and submits that the main case has been concluded by the trial Court. Under the circumstances, this petition having become infructuous is hereby disposed of along with listed applications. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
